title: Yearn - Rekt III
relevance_summary: Unchecked arithmetic underflow in a forgotten yETH relic contract

prevention.rule: Block any tx that mints tokens in an unchecked arithmetic context

monitoring_rules: Monitor for any tx that mints tokens without checks
summary: A forgotten yETH relic contract with unchecked arithmetic logic minted an astronomical amount of tokens, leading to $9 million in losses. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring for unchecked token minting.
